resume.summary: Senior product designer with 5 years in music streaming and consumer apps. Crafted experiences for 50M+ monthly active users. Expert in design systems and user research.

bullets: Led redesign of Discover Weekly experience (50M users impacted)
Built Spotify Design System across 6 product teams
Conducted 200+ user research sessions informing product direction
Designed Creative Cloud mobile companion app (4.5 stars, 2M downloads)
Established design token architecture used across Adobe products

projects.name: DesignToken.io

projects.name: PodcastPlayer
projects.description: Redesigned podcast listening experience for Spotify. In production for 30M users.
